data.name: Alluring Lullaby
data.detailed_description:
Trapped in a labyrinthic jail for mythical creatures, Luna is a succubus who has to find a way to escape from this place without losing her mind.

Meet various colorful NPCs in this place, and find out the secrets that this wicked place keeps hidden in its most dark and forgotten depths.


Escape stealthily from the monsters that guard this place or use your seductive succubus powers to make your way through the dungeon.
Your behaviour will decide which endings you get: depending on how much you have abused your succubus powers, the Minotaur who guards this place will judge you differently, and decide if you're worthy of leaving or not.

The jail is also is full of puzzles to solve and mysterious npcs who will either help you in your journey or make it end prematurely.

Additionally, In the jail you will find other prisoners who have been trapped by the minotaur; help them and they will show their appreciation in a variety of sexy ways, or kill them if you want to grow in power even further.

  • More than 10 different endings

  • Voice-acted sex scenes by an industry professional

  • Unique 2.5D modernized retro graphics

  • Handcrafted adult content.

  • Resolve conflicts peacefully or forcefully with your seductive powers

  • Lots of secrets to find

  • Over 20 different lewd animations to unlock.

  • Retro-feel gameplay.

  • A variety of colorful npcs and creatures to help or to corrupt

data.short_description: Trapped in a labyrinthic jail for mythical creatures, Luna is a succubus who has to find a way to escape from this place without losing her mind.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Potato
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Pixel art, can run on a potato pc
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or 11
  • 處理器: Potato
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Pixel art, can run on a potato pc
